title: Topic browser component with filtering, sorting, and loading states
purpose: Displays a list of topics with filtering and sorting capabilities, handling loading, error, and empty states.
module_context: Exports a TopicBrowser React component that manages topic filtering and sorting state, fetches topics via a custom hook, and renders a filter bar and topic rows.

steps.content: Initialize filter and sort state for topic display.
Fetch topics using a custom hook with current filters and sorting.
Render a filter bar component with handlers for filter, sort by, and sort order changes.
Display loading spinner while topics are being fetched.
Display error message with retry button if topic fetching fails.
Display empty state message when no topics match current filters.
Render topic rows for each fetched topic with selection handling.
Show results count below the topic list.
Update the filter state with the new filter values.
Update the sort by state with the new sorting criterion.
Update the sort order state with the new sorting direction.
